data.scene: User manually enters a Home Assistant server URL during onboarding.
data.purpose: Establish a connection to the user's Home Assistant server for all subsequent app communications.
data.item: Home Assistant server URL (manually entered by the user)
data.frequency: One-time at first connection; URL can be changed later in server settings
data.switchpath: Settings -> Servers -> Add or change server URL

data.scene: User discovers a Home Assistant server on the local network via Bonjour/mDNS during onboarding.
data.purpose: Automatically detect and connect to a Home Assistant server on the local network for convenient onboarding.
data.source: Local network (Android NsdManager for Bonjour/mDNS service discovery)
data.item: Discovered server name, hostname, and URL from local network mDNS responses
data.frequency: On-demand each time the user taps 'Search' on the server discovery screen
data.processing: Local only (network discovery results are ephemeral; selected URL stored locally)
data.storage: Discovered results transient; selected server URL stored in EncryptedSharedPreferences
data.thirdparty: No third-party involvement; mDNS discovery is confined to the local network

permissions.name: ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE
permissions.scene: During server discovery and connection (determining network availability and connectivity type)
permissions.purpose: Determine network availability and connectivity type before attempting server discovery or connection
permissions.impact: If blocked, the app cannot verify network connectivity before attempting server connection; server discovery may fail silently

permissions.name: ACCESS_WIFI_STATE
permissions.scene: During Bonjour/mDNS server discovery on the local network
permissions.purpose: Check if WiFi is enabled for local network Bonjour/mDNS service discovery
permissions.impact: If blocked, the app cannot determine if WiFi is active for local network discovery; mDNS discovery may not function correctly
